reason: Check mailbox wake/result delivery remains a delivery envelope and does not become a second result authority.
Check terminal fallback preserves LifecycleGate ownership and first-writer-wins semantics.
Check any projection or diagnostic event changes preserve typed Backbone protocol and generated TS bindings.
Check AgentRun list/workspace refresh follows backend projection authority instead of local inference.
Check child evidence locators point through correct AgentRun/lifecycle surfaces and do not assume child-local paths are parent-visible.
Check acceptance criteria still align with the durable terminal effect and gate fallback work already completed.
